key.name: github-token
key.description: GitHub PAT or OAuth token used to authenticate against the GitHub Copilot API. Run `gh auth token` to get your current token.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to poll the GitHub Copilot API for updated usage data.

key.name: last-raw-response
key.description: The most recent raw JSON response body from the GitHub Copilot API, used for debugging.

key.name: refresh-trigger
key.description: Incrementing this value signals the extension to perform an immediate API refresh. Written by the preferences dialog.

key.name: openrouter-api-key
key.description: API key for authenticating against the OpenRouter API. Obtain one at https://openrouter.ai/keys.

key.name: openrouter-last-raw-response
key.description: The most recent raw JSON response body from the OpenRouter API, used for debugging.

key.name: github-copilot-enabled
key.description: When false, the GitHub Copilot provider is not polled and is hidden from the panel menu.

key.name: openrouter-enabled
key.description: When false, the OpenRouter provider is not polled and is hidden from the panel menu.
